// Schema for stage 3: Extract record pe: Output from per-topic QA extraction agents. Each record answers one question about a topic
title: Stage 3 Extract Record Per Question

topic_id.description: Reference to the topic_id from stage 2a

answer_anchor.description: Reference to the source location (e.g., chunk_index and word range)

answer_rationale.description: Detailed explanation of how the answer was derived and grounded in the source

confidence.description: Confidence score for this answer (optional, 0-1 range)
